upgrades.name: Gravity Well

upgrades.description: Dust yield +35% per level.

upgrades.description: Layer stabilization +25% per level.

upgrades.name: Harmonic Resonator
upgrades.description: Automation cadence +20% per level.

upgrades.name: Self-Jolting Belt
upgrades.description: Automatically jolts the conveyor every few seconds.

upgrades.name: Flux Gearbox
upgrades.description: Speeds up automated conveyor jolts.

upgrades.name: Overflow Catchers
upgrades.description: Overflowing hoppers sometimes double packaged output and dust.

upgrades.name: Launch Scripts
upgrades.description: Automates launch bay boosts at a steady cadence.

upgrades.name: Cryo Pumps
upgrades.description: Cuts the delay between automated launch bay boosts.

upgrades.name: Telemetry Drones
upgrades.description: Raises launch success chance by +18% per level.

upgrades.name: Crucible Sequencer
upgrades.description: Automates cracking the crucible for asteroid gains.

upgrades.name: Geode Shifters
upgrades.description: Accelerates automated crucible strikes.

upgrades.name: Fission Catalyst
upgrades.description: Asteroid crafts sometimes fracture into extra rubble and dust.

upgrades.name: Orbital Metronome
upgrades.description: Automates tuning of the planetarium.

upgrades.name: Gravimetric Drives
upgrades.description: Spins automated tuning cycles faster.

upgrades.name: Moon Nurseries
upgrades.description: Every new moon grants bonus planets and dust.

upgrades.name: Hammer Servitors
upgrades.description: Automates striking the forge.

upgrades.name: Solar Flywheels
upgrades.description: Reduces the wait between automated forge strikes.

upgrades.name: Supernova Crucibles
upgrades.description: Forged stars erupt for bonus dust and occasional extra stars.

upgrades.name: Autonomous Loom
upgrades.description: Spins the celestial loom on its own.

upgrades.name: Stellar Relays
upgrades.description: Quickens the cadence of automated galaxy weaving.

upgrades.name: Cluster Architects
upgrades.description: Galaxy weaves may cluster into extra galaxies and light bursts.

upgrades.name: Continuum Orchestrator
upgrades.description: Synchronizes universes automatically.

upgrades.name: Quantum Gyres
upgrades.description: Accelerates automated universe syncing.

upgrades.name: Continuum Inflectors
upgrades.description: Universes grant extra dust, singularity progress, and sometimes duplicate.

upgrades.name: Echoing Focus
upgrades.description: Automatically channels the singularity crucible.

upgrades.name: Collapser Lattices
upgrades.description: Tightens the cadence of automated singularity focus.

upgrades.name: Echoed Crystallization
upgrades.description: Crystallization echoes with a chance to mint bonus cores.

research.description: Collect +1 of gathered powder per rank.
